title: AI-AI-Oh! Engaging AI Uses in Education
description: Artificial Intelligence can be used in so many different ways in schools to improve teaching, learning, creativity, productivity, support, and more for educators and students. Explore dozens of uses for generative AI including support for reading, writing, daily tasks, tutoring, coding, conversations, feedback, and much more.

title: Time - 6pm to 11pm (come and go as needed)
ISTE Ignite Session - The Bionic Educator
description: Will technology ever replace a teacher? Who (or what) is the best educator in the world? The answer may surprise you. Learn about the amazing rise of artificial intelligence and see what you can do to be the best educator you can be and how your students can be the best learners they can be.

title: AI & Edtech Power Hour: Turbocharged Tools for Every Subject and Grade
description: Discover transformative AI and Edtech tools across subjects and grade levels in this fast-paced, interactive panel. Led by educators known for sharing, we'll spotlight practical applications and innovative pedagogies to engage all learners. Leave with a toolkit of resources to energize your classroom and enhance student outcomes.

title: The 'Gem in AI' - Google AI Tools for Education
description: Google has long been a leader when it comes to creating and using artificial intelligence in practical ways. In this session we will explore a wide range of Google tools that incorporate generative AI including Google Gemini, NotebookLM, Search Generative Experience, integrations in Docs, Slides, Sheets, Gmail, Search, Classroom and more! See how these tools can be used by teachers and students.

title: Level Up Every Learner with SchoolAI
description: AI finally makes the promise and potential of personalize learning a reality. AI can meet each student where they are at, providing the support, tutoring, enrichment, information, and challenge as needed for every individual learner. Explore how SchoolAI can level up every learner!

title: Supercharge Your Books: AI Tools in Book Creator
description: Book Creator is already powerful, but your can supercharge it with AI! Discover the AI-powered tools built right into Book Creator including AutoDraw, Speech to Text, Text to Speech, Translation, Captions, Transcripts, and more!

title: The Joy of Drawings: Amazing Learning Activities with Google Drawings
description: Google Drawings is part of the Drive suite of tools but is often overlooked. However it is a fantastic program for student learning and teacher instruction. In this session we cover the basics of how Drawings works, and then we try out dozens of practical examples of how it can be used in schools, including graphic organizers, math manipulatives, desktop publishing, interactive digital posters, drag-and-drop poetry, creating memes, making composite "green screen" images, innovative art projects, collaborative games, and more.

title: 💻 Yes (even) You Can Code with the Help of AI!
description: Don't know Python from Perl? Is HTML all IDK to you? Do you think JavaScript is the handwriting on your Starbucks cup? Even if you have never written a line of code in your life, you can with AI! In this session we will see how to use tools such as Bard and ChatGPT to create code that you can use in Google Docs, Sheets, and Sites for learning games, activities, supports, time-savers, productivity helpers, and more.
